plurals.name: settings_download_directory_migrated
plurals.item: Moved %1$d downloaded file and switched folders
Moved %1$d downloaded files and switched folders

plurals.name: settings_download_directory_migrated_partial
plurals.item: Moved %1$d file, but cleanup left %2$d behind
Moved %1$d files, but cleanup left %2$d behind

plurals.name: settings_download_directory_migrate_failed
plurals.item: Failed to move %1$d file, so the original folder was kept
Failed to move %1$d files, so the original folder was kept

plurals.name: listen_together_notice_controller_offline
plurals.item: Controller is offline. Room closes in about %1$d minute if not reconnected.
Controller is offline. Room closes in about %1$d minutes if not reconnected.
